title: El Mencho / CJNG Tracker Update — Fri Apr 24, 2026
summary: Day 61 of the post-Mencho CJNG succession crisis. Fractura Total Day 13 (El Jardinero/El Sapo vs. O3/Los Cuinis) remains in sustained buildup with no direct inter-faction heartland combat confirmed.
